Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt

Class SpecificationRepository

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt.SpecificationRepository
public final class SpecificationRepository extends Object
Central storage for all specification elements, such as contracts, class axioms, and loop invariants. Provides methods for adding such elements to the repository, and for retrieving them afterwards.

    Registers the passed (atomic) contract, and inherits it to all overriding methods.

    getClassAxioms(KeYJavaType selfKjt)
    Returns all class axioms visible in the passed class, including the axioms induced by invariant declarations.

    getClassInvariants(KeYJavaType kjt)
    Returns all known class invariants for the passed type.

    getContractByName(String name)
    Returns the registered (atomic or combined) contract corresponding to the passed name, or null.

    • getClassInvariants

      public ImmutableSet<ClassInvariant> getClassInvariants(KeYJavaType kjt)

      Returns all known class invariants for the passed type.

      This method is used by Visual DbC and has to be public.

    • map

      public void map(UnaryOperator<Term> op, Services services)
      Applies the specified operator to every contract in this repository.
      Parameters:
      op - an operator.
      services - services.
      See Also:
      • SpecificationElement.map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator, Services)

      public void addClassInvariant(ClassInvariant inv)
      Registers the passed class invariant, and inherits it to all subclasses if it is public or protected.

    • addClassInvariants

      public void addClassInvariants(ImmutableSet<ClassInvariant> toAdd)
      Registers the passed class invariants.

    • createContractsFromInitiallyClauses

      public void createContractsFromInitiallyClauses() throws SLTranslationException
      Adds postconditions raising from initially clauses to all constructors. Warning: To be called after all contracts have been registered.
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - may be thrown during contract extraction

    • addInitiallyClause

      public void addInitiallyClause(InitiallyClause ini)
      Registers the passed initially clause. Initially clauses in JML specify the post-state of any constructor of subtypes; they may particularly be used in interface types. To create proof obligations from initially clauses, the method createContractsFromInitiallyClauses adds them to the contracts of respective constructors (or adds a contract if there is none yet).
      Parameters:
      ini - initially clause

    • addInitiallyClauses

      public void addInitiallyClauses(ImmutableSet<InitiallyClause> toAdd)
      Registers the passed initially clauses.

    • getClassAxioms

      public ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> getClassAxioms(KeYJavaType selfKjt)
      Returns all class axioms visible in the passed class, including the axioms induced by invariant declarations.

    • addClassAxiom

      public void addClassAxiom(ClassAxiom ax)
      Registers the passed class axiom.

    • addClassAxioms

      public void addClassAxioms(ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> toAdd)
      Registers the passed class axioms.

    • getProofs

      public ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(ProofOblInput po)
      Returns all proofs registered for the passed PO (or stronger POs).

    • getProofs

      public ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(Contract atomicContract)
      Returns all proofs registered for the passed atomic contract, or for combined contracts including the passed atomic contract

    • getProofs

      public ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(KeYJavaType kjt, IObserverFunction target)
      Returns all proofs registered for the passed target and its overriding targets.

    • getAllProofs

      public ImmutableSet<Proof> getAllProofs()
      Returns all proofs registered with this specification repository.

    • getProofOblInput

      public ProofOblInput getProofOblInput(Proof proof)
      Returns the ProofOblInput from which the given Proof was created.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof.
      Returns:
      The ProofOblInput of the given Proof or null if not available.

    • getTargetOfProof

      public IObserverFunction getTargetOfProof(Proof proof)
      Returns the target that the passed proof is about, or null.

    • registerProof

      public void registerProof(ProofOblInput po, Proof proof)
      Registers the passed proof.

    • removeProof

      public void removeProof(Proof proof)
      Unregisters the passed proof.

    • getLoopSpec

      public LoopSpecification getLoopSpec(LoopStatement loop)
      Returns the registered loop invariant for the passed loop, or null.

    • copyLoopInvariant

      public void copyLoopInvariant(LoopStatement from, LoopStatement to)
      Copies a loop invariant from a loop statement to another. If the original loop does not possess an invariant, none is set to the target. A possibly existing old registration will be overwritten, a registration for the original loop remains untouched.
      Parameters:
      from - the loop with the original contract
      to - the loop for which the contract is to be copied

    • addLoopInvariant

      public void addLoopInvariant(LoopSpecification inv)
      Registers the passed loop invariant, possibly overwriting an older registration for the same loop.

    • getBlockContracts

      public ImmutableSet<BlockContract> getBlockContracts(StatementBlock block)
      Returns all block contracts for the specified block.
      Parameters:
      block - a block.
      Returns:
      all block contracts for the specified block.

    • getLoopContracts

      public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(StatementBlock block)
      Returns all loop contracts for the specified block.
      Parameters:
      block - a block.
      Returns:
      all loop contracts for the specified block.

      public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(LoopStatement loop)
      Returns all loop contracts for the specified loop.

      Returns:

      modality - the given modality.
      Returns:

    • getLoopContracts

      public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(StatementBlock block, Modality modality)

    • getLoopContracts

      public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getLoopContracts(LoopStatement loop, Modality modality)
      Returns loop contracts for according loop statement and modality.
      Parameters:
      loop - the given loop.
      modality - the given modality.
      Returns:
      the set of resulting loop statements.

    • addBlockContract

      public void addBlockContract(BlockContract contract)
      Adds a new BlockContract and a new FunctionalBlockContract to the repository.
      Parameters:
      contract - the BlockContract to add.

    • addBlockContract

      public void addBlockContract(BlockContract contract, boolean addFunctionalContract)
      Adds a new BlockContract to the repository.
      Parameters:
      contract - the BlockContract to add.
      addFunctionalContract - whether or not to add a new FunctionalBlockContract based on contract.

    • removeBlockContract

      public void removeBlockContract(BlockContract contract)

      Removes a BlockContract from the repository.

      The associated FunctionalBlockContract is not removed.

      Parameters:
      contract - the BlockContract to remove.

    • addLoopContract

      public void addLoopContract(LoopContract contract)
      Adds a new LoopContract and a new FunctionalLoopContract to the repository.
      Parameters:
      contract - the LoopContract to add.

    • addLoopContract

      public void addLoopContract(LoopContract contract, boolean addFunctionalContract)
      Adds a new LoopContract to the repository.
      Parameters:
      contract - the LoopContract to add.
      addFunctionalContract - whether or not to add a new FunctionalLoopContract based on contract.

    • removeLoopContract

      public void removeLoopContract(LoopContract contract)

      Removes a LoopContract from the repository.

      The associated FunctionalLoopContract is not removed.

      Parameters:
      contract - the LoopContract to remove.

    • addMergeContract

      public void addMergeContract(MergeContract mc)
      Registers a MergeContract.
      Parameters:
      mc - The MergeContract to register.

    • removeMergeContracts

      public void removeMergeContracts(MergePointStatement mps)
      Deletes the MergeContracts for a given MergePointStatement.
      Parameters:
      mps - The MergePointStatement to delete the registered contracts for.

    • addSpecs

      public void addSpecs(ImmutableSet<SpecificationElement> specs)

    • limitObs

      public Pair<IObserverFunction,ImmutableSet<Taclet>> limitObs(IObserverFunction obs)

    • unlimitObs

      public IObserverFunction unlimitObs(IObserverFunction obs)

    • addRepresentsTermToWdChecksForModelFields

      public void addRepresentsTermToWdChecksForModelFields(KeYJavaType kjt)
      Represent terms belong to model fields, so the well-definedness check considers both of them together.
      Parameters:
      kjt - The relevant KeYJavaType

    • addWdStatement

      public void addWdStatement(StatementWellDefinedness swd)
      Registers a well-definedness check for a jml statement. It does not take care of its visibility in the proof management dialog.
      Parameters:
      swd - The well-definedness check

    • getAllWdChecks

      public ImmutableSet<WellDefinednessCheck> getAllWdChecks()
      Returns all registered well-definedness checks.
